sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 다나허는 2026년 1분기 매출 59억 5,100만 달러를 기록하며 영업이익률 40포인트 개선을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 영업이익률은 전년 동기 22.2%에서 22.6%로 40포인트 상승하며 수익성 개선 흐름을 보였습니다.
경영진은 환율 변동성과 인수합병 효과를 제외한 핵심 매출 성장률을 통해 사업의 기저 성장 추세를 파악하고 성과를 평가합니다.

riskChanges.text: 중동 지역의 분쟁이 지속되거나 격화될 경우, 제품 수요 감소 및 운영상의 부정적 영향이 확대될 위험이 있습니다.
환율 변동은 경영진이 통제할 수 없는 외부 요인으로, 회사의 실제 사업 성과를 왜곡하거나 변동성을 유발할 수 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 인수합병 및 사업 매각은 그 규모와 시기가 매 분기마다 크게 달라질 수 있어, 이를 제외한 핵심 매출 지표가 사업의 본질적 성장을 측정하는 데 활용됩니다.

financialHighlights.text: 당기순이익은 10억 2,900만 달러이며, 총자산 규모는 835억 4,400만 달러 수준입니다.

watchItems.text: 환율 효과를 제외한 핵심 매출 성장률이 0.5%에 그친 점은 글로벌 수요 둔화 가능성을 시사하므로, 향후 분기별 유기적 성장 회복 여부를 주시해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-03-27 revenue = 59억 5,100만 달러 (USD 5.951B; 5,951 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-27.
Quarter ended 2026-03-27 operating income = 13억 4,400만 달러 (USD 1.344B; 1,344 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-27.
Quarter ended 2026-03-27 net income = 10억 2,900만 달러 (USD 1.029B; 1,029 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-27.
Quarter ended 2026-03-27 total assets = 835억 4,400만 달러 (USD 83.544B; 83,544 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-27.

Item 1A - Risk Factors” for a further discussion of the risks relating to the conflict in the Middle East. To the extent the conflict continues and/or escalates, the negative impacts noted above may continue or increase, the risks referenced above may eventuate and demand for the Company’s products could be adversely affected. 23 Table of Contents RESULTS OF OPERATIONS Non-GAAP Measures In this Report, references to the non-GAAP measure of core sales (also referred to as core revenues or sales/revenues from existing businesses) refer to sales calculated according to U.S. GAAP, but excluding: • sales from acquired businesses (as defined below); and • the impact of currency translation. References to sales or operating profit attributable to acquisitions or acquired businesses refer to sales or operating profit, as applicable, from acquired businesses recorded prior to the first anniversar

owth trends in Danaher’s business and facilitating comparisons of Danaher’s revenue performance with its performance in prior and future periods and to Danaher’s peers. Management also uses this non-GAAP financial measure to measure the Company’s operating and financial performance and uses core sales growth as one of the performance measures in the Company’s executive short-term cash incentive compensation program. The Company excludes the effect of currency translation from this measure because currency translation is not under management’s control, is subject to volatility and can obscure underlying business trends. The Company excludes the effect of acquisitions and divestiture-related items because the nature, size, timing and number of acquisitions and divestitures can vary dramatically from period-to-period and between the Company and its peers and can also obscure underlying busi

ness trends and make comparisons of long-term performance difficult. Throughout this discussion, references to sales growth or decline refer to the impact of both price and unit sales and references to productivity improvements generally refer to improved cost-efficiencies resulting from the ongoing application of the Danaher Business System. Sales Growth and Core Sales Growth % Change Three-Month Period Ended March 27, 2026 vs. Comparable 2025 Period Total sales growth (GAAP) 3.5 % Impact of: Currency exchange rates (3.0) % Core sales growth (non-GAAP) 0.5 % Operating Profit Performance Operating profit margins increased 40 basis points from 22.2% during the three-month period ended March 28, 2025 to 22.6% for the three-month period ended March 27, 2026. First quarter 2026 vs. first quarter 2025 operating profit margin comparisons were favorably impacted by: • Higher first quarter 2026  Normalized numeric aliases: 40 basis points = 40포인트.
